text: 🐻 Here are the key things you need to know about the past 24 hours in this crazy world: ➡️ Ukraine started pumping oil through the Druzhba pipeline ➡️ EU foreign ministers reject proposal to suspend association agreement with Israel , and the EU announces a fresh €600 million funding package for Ukraine. ➡️ Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf explains when a complete ceasefire would make sense ➡️ US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent says oil could have hit $150 if the US had not eased anti-Russia sanctions. ➡️ Trump manages to save AI generated women from death. ➡️ US State Department urges American citizens to leave Lebanon ➡️ Iran seizes two ships in strait of Hormuz (here's the footage ) ➡️ US Secretary of the Navy John Phelan resigns ➡️ Some sources reported explosions near Tehran but there isn't any confirmation from the Iranian media 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🐻 以下是过去24小时内这个疯狂世界中你需要了解的关键事项： ➡️ 乌克兰开始通过友谊输油管道输送石油 ➡️ 欧盟外交部长拒绝了暂停与以色列联系协议的提议，欧盟宣布向乌克兰提供一笔6亿欧元的新资金方案。 ➡️ 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴盖尔·卡利巴夫解释了何时实现全面停火才具有意义 ➡️ 美国财政部长斯科特·贝森特表示，如果美国没有放宽对俄制裁，油价本可能达到150美元。 ➡️ 特朗普成功拯救了人工智能生成的女性免于死亡。 ➡️ 美国国务院敦促美国公民离开黎巴嫩 ➡️ 伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡扣押了两艘船只（这是现场画面） ➡️ 美国海军部长约翰·费伦辞职 ➡️ 一些消息来源报道称德黑兰附近发生爆炸，但伊朗媒体尚未证实 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Kan: Two Israeli F-15 crew members have been arrested and charged with attempting to pass along sensitive information about Israeli F-15s to Iran. “The Iranian regime has been exposed in the air, we are with you on this, tomorrow there will be interrogations against two soldiers on this subject. Yes, Maya, tomorrow there will be two interrogations against two SADIR soldiers, those who served in sensitive positions based on Tel Nof. They served as aircraft technicians and from the power of their duties they were operated by Iran and brought sensitive information. A commander based on Tel Nof, recently, gathered all the soldiers there and called for sending the information to the enemy. In the end, it was decided not to put a bandage on one of the prisoners, but to use a bandage of aid to the enemy during the war. This investigation was also conducted by the General Security Service in cooperation with Yalap of the Central Station, Yalap Sharon. Among other things, these two are accused of gathering information on the former Chief of Staff Herzl Levy and Sgt. Ben-Gvir, a series of locations they were required to provide and also the timetables of the two. A series of locations they were required to provide and also the timetables of the two. The missions cost hundreds of dollars. And as I said, tomorrow, these two are expected to become the accused. In addition to the severe bandage, this time, two soldiers in SADIR, in a sensitive position, were sent critical information to our great enemy, the state of Iran. Thank you, Shelly.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Kan：两名以色列F-15机组人员因试图向伊朗传递有关以色列F-15的敏感信息而被捕并被起诉。“伊朗政权在空中已被曝光，我们与你们同在，明天将针对两名士兵就此事进行审讯。是的，玛雅，明天将有两名针对两名现役（SADIR）士兵的审讯，他们曾在特尔诺夫（Tel Nof）基地的敏感岗位服役。他们担任飞机技术员，利用职务之便被伊朗操纵并提供了敏感信息。最近，特尔诺夫基地的一名指挥官召集了所有士兵，并呼吁向敌人发送信息。最终，决定不对其中一名囚犯进行包扎，而是在战争期间对敌人使用援助包扎。这项调查也是由国家安全总局与中央车站的Yalap、Yalap Sharon合作进行的。除其他事项外，这两人被指控收集有关前总参谋长赫尔齐·哈勒维（Herzl Levy）和本-格维尔（Ben-Gvir）中士的信息，包括他们被要求提供的一系列地点以及两人的时间表。他们被要求提供的一系列地点以及两人的时间表。这些任务价值数百美元。正如我所说，明天，这两人预计将成为被告。除了严重的包扎外，这一次，两名处于敏感岗位的现役士兵向我们的大敌伊朗国发送了关键信息。谢谢你，雪莉。” @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 The New York Times, citing ship-tracking data, says that despite an ongoing conflict involving the U.S. and Israel, Iran continues to maintain strong influence over the Strait of Hormuz. 🔹 From March 2 to Sunday, 308 Iran-linked vessels passed through the strait, while only 90 non-Iran-linked ships transited (all requiring Iranian clearance). 🔹 Despite more than 13,000 U.S. airstrikes on Iranian targets and the imposition of a naval blockade, Tehran still holds significant leverage. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 《纽约时报》援引船舶跟踪数据称，尽管美国和以色列卷入了持续的冲突，但伊朗仍对霍尔木兹海峡保持着强大的影响力。 🔹 从3月2日到周日，共有308艘与伊朗有关的船只通过了该海峡，而只有90艘与伊朗无关的船只通过（且全部需要伊朗的许可）。 🔹 尽管美国对伊朗目标进行了超过13,000次空袭并实施了海上封锁，德黑兰仍然掌握着重要的筹码。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 POLITICO : The British Ministry of Defence has announced that British military divers are preparing to conduct mine-clearing operations in the Strait of Hormuz. The Royal Navy experts will provide additional options alongside uncrewed systems, and Britain will also offer autonomous mine-hunters as part of a proposed multinational mission to safeguard the strait. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 POLITICO：英国国防部宣布，英国军事潜水员正准备在霍尔木兹海峡进行扫雷行动。英国皇家海军的专家将提供除无人系统之外的额外选择，英国还将提供自主扫雷艇，作为拟议中的多国海峡保护任务的一部分。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇪 🇺🇸 Reuters: Peru made a $462 million payment for US made F16 fighter jets as part of a multi billion dollar deal, triggering the resignations of the defense and foreign ministers who opposed the government’s handling of the agreement. Officials said the purchase will modernize Peru’s aging fleet, with deliveries expected later this decade. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇪 🇺🇸 路透社：秘鲁支付了4.62亿美元用于购买美国制造的F-16战斗机，这是数十亿美元交易的一部分，此举引发了反对政府处理该协议的国防部长和外交部长的辞职。官员们表示，此次采购将使秘鲁老化的机队实现现代化，预计在本十年晚些时候交付。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇰🇵 North Korea and Russia said they aim to open a new road bridge across the Tumen River soon, linking the two countries to boost trade, tourism, and movement of people. The project was launched about a year ago and is expected to connect with Russia’s highway network and expand cross border cooperation. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇰🇵 朝鲜和俄罗斯表示，他们计划很快开通一座横跨图们江的新公路桥，连接两国以促进贸易、旅游和人员往来。该项目于大约一年前启动，预计将与俄罗斯的高速公路网相连，并扩大跨境合作。 @wfwitness

text: WarMonitor This can't just be a coincidence. BREAKING: Traders placed a series of bets worth $430 million on a drop in crude prices just 15 minutes before U.S. President Donald Trump ​said he would extend a ceasefire with Iran. It is the third ‌time this month, and the fourth in total, that large, well-timed directional bets on the oil price have been made shortly before major announcements on the Iran war. The traders gained millions. Unusual. - unusual_whales tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 这不可能是巧合。突发：在美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示将延长与伊朗的停火协议前仅15分钟，交易员们就原油价格下跌押注了4.3亿美元。这是本月第三次，也是总共第四次，在有关伊朗战争的重大声明发布前不久，有人对油价进行了大规模、时机精准的定向押注。这些交易员获利数百万美元。不同寻常。 - unusual_whales 推文

text: OSINTdefender According to a release from U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM), 31 vessels have been directed to return to Iranian ports or turn around since the beginning of the U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. Additionally, per the report, the majority of vessels that were redirected were oil tankers. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 根据美国中央司令部（CENTCOM）发布的消息，自美国对霍尔木兹海峡实施封锁以来，已有31艘船只被要求返回伊朗港口或掉头。此外，据报告，被改道的船只中大多数是油轮。推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM): "U.S. forces have directed 31 vessels to turn around or return to port as part of the U.S. blockade against Iran." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047114885608145153/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国中央司令部（CENTCOM）：“作为美国对伊朗封锁行动的一部分，美军已要求31艘船只掉头或返回港口。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047114885608145153/photo/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 CENTCOM released an overview of the ongoing blockade of Iranian ports, saying US forces have redirected over 30 vessels, most of them oil tankers, while deploying more than 10,000 troops, over 100 aircraft, and at least 17 warships. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国中央司令部发布了关于对伊朗港口持续封锁的概述，称美军已拦截超过30艘船只（主要是油轮），并部署了超过10,000名士兵、100多架飞机和至少17艘军舰。 @wfwitness

text: U.S. Central Command U.S. forces have directed 31 vessels to turn around or return to port as part of the U.S. blockade against Iran. 🇺🇸 tweet

text: Open Source Intel Drone activity reportedly observed over western Tehran, Iran. The circumstances remain unclear. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047111020326404311/video/1 tweet

text: OSINTdefender Reports of a resumption of joint U.S.-Israeli strikes against Iran are currently assessed as non-credible, as pro-Iranian channels claim that explosions and working air defense systems are the result of air defense exercises. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：目前评估认为有关美以联合对伊朗恢复打击的报道不可信，亲伊朗频道声称爆炸声和防空系统的运作是防空演习的结果。 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @CENTCOM : U.S. forces have directed 29 vessels to turn around or return to port as part of the U.S. blockade against Iran. Over past 24 hours, media reports have alleged that several commercial ships evaded the blockade, citing M/V Hero II, M/V Hedy, and M/V Dorena as examples. These reports are inaccurate. Hero II and Hedy did not sail past the blockade as part of a flotilla that “ferried” millions of barrels of oil to the market. In fact, the Iranian-flagged tankers are anchored in Chah Bahar, Iran, after being intercepted by U.S. forces earlier this week. Dorena has been under the escort of a U.S. Navy destroyer in the Indian Ocean after previously attempting to violate the blockade. The U.S. military has global reach. American forces are operating and enforcing the blockade across the Middle East and beyond. tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 转推 @CENTCOM ：作为美国对伊朗封锁行动的一部分，美军已引导29艘船只掉头或返回港口。在过去24小时内，媒体报道称有几艘商船躲过了封锁，并列举了M/V Hero II、M/V Hedy和M/V Dorena作为例子。这些报道是不准确的。Hero II和Hedy并没有作为“运送”数百万桶石油到市场的船队的一部分通过封锁线。事实上，这些悬挂伊朗国旗的油轮在本周早些时候被美军拦截后，目前正停泊在伊朗的恰巴哈尔。Dorena在之前试图违反封锁后，一直处于美国海军驱逐舰在印度洋的护航之下。美军拥有全球打击能力。美军正在中东及其他地区开展行动并执行封锁。 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇰🇷 🇮🇷 South Korea’s special envoy Chang Byung ha met Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi in Tehran, where Araghchi accused the United States and Israel of driving insecurity in the Persian Gulf and Strait of Hormuz and urged countries to take a firm stance condemning the attacks. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇰🇷 🇮🇷 韩国特使张炳河（Chang Byung ha）在德黑兰会见了伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格希（Abbas Araghchi），阿拉格希指责美国和以色列导致了波斯湾和霍尔木兹海峡的不安全局势，并敦促各国采取坚定立场谴责这些袭击。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷As previously speculated it is air defence tests rather than an attack. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Footage of Iranian drones over western Tehran during defence drills and tests early this Thursday morning. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷正如之前所推测的那样，这是防空测试，而非袭击。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 本周四凌晨，伊朗无人机在德黑兰西部进行防御演习和测试的画面。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇶 Unconfirmed initial reports of military aircraft activity over northern Iraq. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇶 Indeed, it was unconfirmed. Airspace over Iraq is normal with civilian flights operating business as usual, with no unusual reports to note. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇶 初步报告称伊拉克北部有军用飞机活动，尚未得到证实。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇶 确实，该消息未经证实。伊拉克领空一切正常，民航航班照常运行，没有值得注意的异常报告。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷 Iranian opposition outlets report that Drones were observed at very high altitude west of Tehran early Thursday morning, and air defences around the capital were activated for several moments. It is unknown whether this was an unannounced training exercise…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 As previously speculated it is air defence tests rather than an attack. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷 伊朗反对派媒体报道称，周四凌晨在德黑兰西部观测到高空无人机，首都周边的防空系统一度被激活。目前尚不清楚这是否是一次未经宣布的训练演习……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 正如之前所推测的那样，这是防空测试，而非袭击。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 No reports from Iranian media on the explosions near Tehran. Some sources point to exercises, others claim a drone was spotted and air defenses activated. Still unclear what actually happened. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Iranian air defenses active 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 伊朗防空系统已激活 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Reports of explosions in Tehran 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 有关德黑兰发生爆炸的报道 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷Unconfirmed reports of explosions and AA activity in northern Tehran. It could be testing as has been done before. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Iranian opposition outlets report that Drones were observed at very high altitude west of Tehran early Thursday morning, and air defences around the capital were activated for several moments. It is unknown whether this was an unannounced training exercise or another event. Iranian state media has not yet commented on the incident. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷 未经证实的德黑兰北部发生爆炸和防空活动的报道。这可能是像以前一样进行的测试。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 伊朗反对派媒体报道称，周四凌晨在德黑兰以西的高空观察到了无人机，首都周围的防空系统被激活了片刻。目前尚不清楚这是一次未经宣布的训练演习还是其他事件。伊朗官方媒体尚未对该事件发表评论。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷 Unconfirmed reports of explosions In Tehran, Karaj and Isfahan. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Unconfirmed reports of explosions and AA activity in northern Tehran. It could be testing as has been done before. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷 未经证实的德黑兰、卡拉杰和伊斯法罕发生爆炸的报道。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 未经证实的德黑兰北部发生爆炸和防空活动的报道。这可能是像以前一样进行的测试。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷 BREAKING: Explosions heard around Tehran, possible AD activity. Iraqi channels reporting possible ballistic missile launches from Kuwait, sounds of fighter jets over northern Iraq. Nothing confirmed by Iranian media so far. Developing... 🔴 @DDGeopolitics…" 🇺🇸 Several US aerial refueling aircraft active over Saudi airspace along the Iraq/Kuwait border. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷 突发：德黑兰周边听到爆炸声，可能是防空活动。伊拉克频道报道称科威特可能发射了弹道导弹，伊拉克北部上空有战斗机声音。目前伊朗媒体尚未证实任何消息。持续更新中…… 🔴 @DDGeopolitics……” 🇺🇸 多架美国空中加油机在伊拉克/科威特边境沿线的沙特领空活动。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇰🇼 Reports of unknown objects in Kuwait before air defense activity in the Iranian capital Tehran. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Unconfirmed reports of explosions In Tehran, Karaj and Isfahan. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇰🇼 有报道称在伊朗首都德黑兰出现防空活动前，科威特上空出现不明物体。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 有未经证实的报道称德黑兰、卡拉杰和伊斯法罕发生爆炸。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 Unconfirmed initial reports of military aircraft activity over northern Iraq. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 有未经证实的初步报道称伊拉克北部上空有军用飞机活动。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇰🇼 Reports of unknown objects in Kuwait before air defense activity in the Iranian capital Tehran. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇰🇼 有报道称在伊朗首都德黑兰出现防空活动前，科威特上空出现不明物体。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 BREAKING: Explosions heard around Tehran, possible AD activity. Iraqi channels reporting possible ballistic missile launches from Kuwait, sounds of fighter jets over northern Iraq. Nothing confirmed by Iranian media so far. Developing... 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 突发：德黑兰周边听到爆炸声，可能是防空活动。伊拉克频道报道称科威特可能发射了弹道导弹，伊拉克北部上空有战斗机声音。目前伊朗媒体尚未证实任何消息。持续更新中…… 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Initial reports of explosions heard in the Iranian capital Tehran. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 初步报道称伊朗首都德黑兰听到爆炸声。@wfwitness

text: U.S. Central Command U.S. Soldiers, Sailors, Marines, Airmen, Guardians, and Coast Guardsmen are deployed across the Middle East as part of the strongest and most lethal military the world has ever known. https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2047098338407793025/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部美国陆军、海军、海军陆战队、空军、太空军和海岸警卫队士兵部署在中东各地，作为世界上有史以来最强大、最致命的军队的一部分。https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2047098338407793025/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel 54 homes were destroyed in a fast-moving wildfire in Brantley County, Georgia. The county manager says the only reported injury is a firefighter who is expected to recover, and so far no deaths have been reported. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047097634008015144/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报佐治亚州布兰特利县一场快速蔓延的野火摧毁了54所房屋。县经理表示，目前唯一报告的伤者是一名消防员，预计将会康复，到目前为止还没有人员死亡的报告。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047097634008015144/video/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix Excellent The worst of all possible scenarios now in Russia's port city of Tuapse, as the oil alreadt raining on the population is now made worse by rain. https://twitter.com/JayinKyiv/status/2046867801554461140/video/1 - Jay in Kyiv tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix Excellent 俄罗斯港口城市图阿普谢现在出现了所有可能情况中最糟糕的一种，原本就已倾泻在民众身上的石油，现在又因降雨而变得更加糟糕。 https://twitter.com/JayinKyiv/status/2046867801554461140/video/1 - Jay in Kyiv 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @JayinKyiv : The worst of all possible scenarios now in Russia's port city of Tuapse, as the oil alreadt raining on the population is now made worse by rain. https://twitter.com/JayinKyiv/status/2046867801554461140/video/1 tweet

text: WarMonitor Does make one wonder. 🤔 Probably not suspicious that Trump fired his Navy Secretary in the middle of a naval blockade. - Ron Filipkowski tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 这确实让人怀疑。🤔 特朗普在海军封锁期间解雇了他的海军部长，这大概并不令人怀疑。 - Ron Filipkowski 推文

text: Nuno Felix How to make friends and win people over @israel_mid_ru @gidonsaar @netanyahu @Isaac_Herzog תודה רבה רוסיה! 🇷🇺 - Israel Foreign Ministry tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 如何结交朋友并赢得人心 @israel_mid_ru @gidonsaar @netanyahu @Isaac_Herzog 非常感谢俄罗斯！ 🇷🇺 - 以色列外交部推文

text: OSINTtechnical Secretary of the Navy Phelan was reportedly fired after “months of simmering tension” with Hegseth -WSJ Hegseth was also reportedly “annoyed” about Phelan’s close relationship with Trump, including his direct pitch of the Trump-class battleship that bypassed Pentagon leadership. In a sudden move, the Secretary of the Navy, John C. Phelan, is departing his role effective immediately. - OSINTtechnical tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 据报道，海军部长费伦在与海格塞斯“数月来不断升温的紧张关系”后被解雇 - WSJ 据报道，海格塞斯还对费伦与特朗普的密切关系感到“恼火”，包括他绕过五角大楼领导层直接向特朗普推销“特朗普级”战列舰。在一项突然的举动中，海军部长约翰·C·费伦即刻离职。 - OSINTtechnical 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) Of note. HI Sutton / Covertshores over at Blue Sky with an important note about the fast boats today that people are saying at laying mines, seizing ships, being a menace to south central whilst drinking their juice in the Hormuz https://twitter.com/EpicFuryMap/status/2046985703439974615/photo/1 - Iran Conflict Maps tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 值得注意。HI Sutton / Covertshores 在 Blue Sky 上发布了一条关于今天快艇的重要说明，人们说这些快艇在霍尔木兹海峡喝着果汁的同时，正在布雷、扣押船只，对中南部地区构成威胁 https://twitter.com/EpicFuryMap/status/2046985703439974615/photo/1 - Iran Conflict Maps 推文
